ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Sive De Attractione. Auctore Ioanne Baptista Masullo Medico Philosopho Neapolitano et Academico Otioso. Ad Illustrissimum et Excellentissimum Dom. D. Marinum Caracciolum Abellini Principem et c.
ItacWorkItem.CensorsAgreement: Imprimatur. Lelius Tastius Vicarius Generalis. Has Academicas Exercitationes ornatissimi Viri Ioannis Baptistae Masulli et nihil Catholicae Fidei dissentaneum continere et ob egregiam eruditionem praelo dignissimas esse censeo. Dat. Neapoli viiij. Idus April. 1622. Antonius Caracciolus Cler. Regul. Deput. Tarusius Tarusius Congreg. Orat. Deput.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
